general.title: General Settings
general.systemNameDescription: The display name of the system

notifications.title: Notification Settings
notifications.description: Configure email alerts and notification preferences
notifications.emailEnabledDescription: Master switch for all email notifications
notifications.alertThresholdDescription: Minimum severity level for alert notifications
notifications.digestFrequencyDescription: How often to send notification digests
notifications.recipientsDescription: Default email recipients for system notifications

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.description: Configure how long data is retained in the system
retention.documentDaysDescription: Number of days to retain processed documents
retention.logDaysDescription: Number of days to retain system logs
retention.auditDaysDescription: Number of days to retain audit trail records
retention.tempFileDaysDescription: Number of days to retain temporary files
retention.saveError: Failed to save data retention settings

actions.resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset this setting to its default value?
